events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: `decision: fail`, `risk: critical`. Three real hazards — garage return-air contamination path, sub-clearance single-wall vent connector near combustible framing, and a condensate line with an uphill trap before the drain — with corresponding immediate corrective actions and code references (IRC M1801, NFPA 54, IRC M1601, IRC M1307.3).
